tool_name: RC Beam Shear & Flexure Calculator — Reinforced Concrete Rectangular Beam Capacity Check
prompt_source: SectorCalc strict technical schema protocol from uploaded file.
standards_basis: ACI CODE-318-25 is the current ACI structural concrete code basis for structural concrete buildings and applicable nonbuilding structures.
EN 1992 Eurocode 2 applies to buildings and civil engineering works in plain, reinforced, and prestressed concrete, including resistance, serviceability, durability, and fire resistance requirements.

inputs.name: Design Standard
inputs.note: Select ACI strength design branch or Eurocode 2 limit-state branch.

inputs.name: Beam Section Type
inputs.validation_rule: Only rectangular singly reinforced beam section is within this tool scope.
inputs.note: T-beam, doubly reinforced beam, prestressed beam, torsion, punching, and anchorage are excluded.

inputs.name: Effective Depth To Tension Steel
inputs.note: Distance from extreme compression fiber to centroid of tensile reinforcement.

inputs.name: Nominal Concrete Cover
inputs.note: Used for warning and constructability trace only.

inputs.name: Concrete Cylinder Characteristic Strength
inputs.validation_rule: Required for EN_1992_1_1. For ACI branch, use f_c_prime = f_ck equivalent only when explicitly confirmed.

inputs.name: Specified Concrete Compressive Strength
inputs.validation_rule: Required for ACI_318_25. For EC2 branch, use f_ck equivalent only when explicitly confirmed.

inputs.name: Concrete Density Modification Factor
inputs.note: ACI lightweight concrete factor. Normalweight concrete λ=1.0.

inputs.name: Reinforcement Elastic Modulus
inputs.note: Steel modulus used for strain-controlled ACI phi factor.

inputs.name: Shear Reinforcement Area Per Spacing
inputs.note: Total area of stirrup legs crossing the shear plane within spacing s.

inputs.name: Shear Reinforcement Spacing
inputs.validation_rule: Required when A_sv > 0. Must satisfy s_v > 0.

inputs.name: EC2 Compression Strut Angle Cotangent
inputs.validation_rule: Used for EN_1992_1_1. Must satisfy 1.0 <= cotθ <= 2.5.

inputs.name: Design Axial Force
inputs.validation_rule: Compression positive. Tension negative. Used only for EC2 shear concrete contribution.
inputs.note: Most standard beam checks use N_Ed=0.

inputs.name: Design Shear Force
inputs.note: Factored design shear at critical section.

inputs.name: Concrete Partial Factor
inputs.validation_rule: Used for EN_1992_1_1. Must follow National Annex.

inputs.name: Reinforcement Partial Factor
inputs.validation_rule: Used for EN_1992_1_1. Must follow National Annex.

inputs.name: Long-Term Concrete Strength Coefficient
inputs.validation_rule: Used for EN_1992_1_1. Must follow National Annex.

inputs.name: Minimum Flexural Reinforcement Ratio Override
inputs.validation_rule: Optional project-specific override. If null, calculated standard-specific minimum check is used.
inputs.note: Use only with authorized project design criteria.

formulas.name: Flexural Reinforcement Ratio
formulas.edge_cases: if (rho_l <= 0) throw new Error('Flexural reinforcement ratio must be positive')

formulas.name: EC2 Concrete Design Compressive Strength
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && f_cd <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 f_cd must be positive')

formulas.name: EC2 Reinforcement Design Yield Strength
assumptions: Reinforcement reaches design yield stress in flexure
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && f_yd <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 f_yd must be positive')

formulas.name: EC2 Rectangular Stress Block Lambda
assumptions: Normal-strength and high-strength concrete stress block parameter
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && (lambda_ec2 <= 0 || lambda_ec2 > 0.8)) throw new Error('EC2 lambda parameter invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Rectangular Stress Block Eta
assumptions: Normal-strength and high-strength concrete stress block parameter
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && (eta_ec2 <= 0 || eta_ec2 > 1.0)) throw new Error('EC2 eta parameter invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Neutral Axis Depth
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && (x_ec2 <= 0 || x_ec2 >= d)) throw new Error('EC2 neutral axis depth invalid or over-reinforced')

formulas.name: EC2 Internal Lever Arm
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && (z_ec2 <= 0 || z_ec2 > d)) throw new Error('EC2 lever arm invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Flexural Resistance
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && M_Rd_ec2 <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 flexural resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: EC2 Size Factor For Shear
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && (k_ec2 < 1 || k_ec2 > 2)) throw new Error('EC2 shear size factor invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Limited Longitudinal Reinforcement Ratio For Shear
formulas.assumptions: rho_l capped at 0.02 for shear concrete resistance
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && rho_l_ec2 <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 shear reinforcement ratio invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Concrete Shear Coefficient
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && C_Rdc <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 C_Rdc invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Axial Stress For Shear
assumptions: Axial stress limited for shear contribution
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && !Number.isFinite(sigma_cp)) throw new Error('EC2 sigma_cp invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Minimum Concrete Shear Stress
assumptions: EC2 empirical minimum shear stress expression
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && v_min_ec2 <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 v_min invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Concrete Shear Resistance Without Links
formulas.expression: Math.max(C_Rdc * k_ec2 * Math.pow(100 * rho_l_ec2 * f_ck, 1 / 3) + 0.15 * sigma_cp, v_min_ec2 + 0.15 * sigma_cp) * b_w * d / 1000
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && V_Rdc_ec2 <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 V_Rdc must be positive')

formulas.name: EC2 Shear Reinforcement Ratio Per Unit Length
formulas.expression: A_sv > 0 && s_v !== null && s_v !== undefined ? A_sv / s_v : 0
assumptions: A_sv is total stirrup leg area within spacing s
formulas.edge_cases: if (A_sv > 0 && (!s_v || s_v <= 0)) throw new Error('Shear reinforcement spacing required when A_sv > 0')

formulas.name: EC2 Design Yield Strength Of Shear Reinforcement
assumptions: Same yield strength used for longitudinal and shear reinforcement
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && f_ywd <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 f_ywd invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Shear Reinforcement Resistance
assumptions: Vertical or inclined shear reinforcement represented by equivalent A_sv
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && V_Rds_ec2 < 0) throw new Error('EC2 V_Rds invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Concrete Crushing Shear Limit
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && v1_ec2 <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 v1 invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Maximum Shear Resistance Limited By Concrete Strut
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && V_Rdmax_ec2 <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 V_Rdmax invalid')

formulas.name: EC2 Governing Shear Resistance
assumptions: With links: truss resistance controlled by V_Rds and V_Rdmax
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'EN_1992_1_1' && V_Rd_ec2 <= 0) throw new Error('EC2 governing shear resistance invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Beta One Factor
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && (beta1_aci < 0.65 || beta1_aci > 0.85)) throw new Error('ACI beta1 invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Equivalent Compression Block Depth
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && (a_aci <= 0 || a_aci >= d)) throw new Error('ACI compression block depth invalid or over-reinforced')

formulas.name: ACI Neutral Axis Depth
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && (c_aci <= 0 || c_aci >= d)) throw new Error('ACI neutral axis depth invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Net Tensile Strain
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && epsilon_t_aci <= 0) throw new Error('ACI tensile strain invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Yield Strain Of Reinforcement
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && epsilon_y_aci <= 0) throw new Error('ACI steel yield strain invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Flexural Strength Reduction Factor
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && (phi_f_aci < 0.65 || phi_f_aci > 0.9)) throw new Error('ACI flexural phi invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Nominal Flexural Strength
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && M_n_aci <= 0) throw new Error('ACI nominal moment strength invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Design Flexural Strength
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && phi_Mn_aci <= 0) throw new Error('ACI design flexural strength invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Concrete Shear Strength
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && V_c_aci <= 0) throw new Error('ACI concrete shear strength invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Shear Reinforcement Strength
formulas.expression: A_sv > 0 && s_v !== null && s_v !== undefined ? A_sv * f_y * d / s_v / 1000 : 0
assumptions: A_sv is total stirrup leg area within spacing s
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && V_s_aci < 0) throw new Error('ACI shear reinforcement strength invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Maximum Shear Reinforcement Contribution Limit
assumptions: Metric expression for maximum shear reinforcement contribution
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && V_s_max_aci <= 0) throw new Error('ACI maximum Vs limit invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Nominal Shear Strength
assumptions: Nominal shear strength is concrete plus permitted shear reinforcement contribution
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && V_n_aci <= 0) throw new Error('ACI nominal shear strength invalid')

formulas.name: ACI Design Shear Strength
formulas.edge_cases: if (design_standard === 'ACI_318_25' && phi_Vn_aci <= 0) throw new Error('ACI design shear strength invalid')

formulas.name: Governing Flexural Design Resistance
formulas.edge_cases: if (M_design <= 0) throw new Error('Governing flexural design resistance invalid')

formulas.name: Governing Shear Design Resistance
formulas.edge_cases: if (V_design <= 0) throw new Error('Governing shear design resistance invalid')

formulas.name: Flexural Utilization Ratio
formulas.edge_cases: if (!Number.isFinite(UC_flexure)) throw new Error('Flexural utilization calculation failed')

formulas.name: Shear Utilization Ratio
assumptions: Factored shear supplied at critical section
formulas.edge_cases: if (!Number.isFinite(UC_shear)) throw new Error('Shear utilization calculation failed')

formulas.name: Governing Utilization Ratio
formulas.edge_cases: if (!Number.isFinite(UC)) throw new Error('Governing utilization calculation failed')

formulas.name: Result Status
formulas.edge_cases: if (UC > 1.25) throw new Error('Safety-critical RC beam overutilization: design fails selected standard')

formulas.name: Combined Standard Uncertainty Of Utilization
formulas.expression: UC * Math.sqrt(Math.pow(0.02, 2) + Math.pow(0.02, 2) + Math.pow(0.01, 2) + Math.pow(0.02, 2) + Math.pow(0.03, 2))
formulas.edge_cases: if (u_c_UC < 0 || !Number.isFinite(u_c_UC)) throw new Error('Uncertainty propagation failed')

rules.message: Only rectangular singly reinforced RC beam section is supported in this tool.
Effective depth d must be smaller than total depth h.
Tension reinforcement area A_s must be positive.
EC2 material strengths and partial factors are invalid.
ACI material strengths, modulus, or strength reduction factor are invalid.
Shear reinforcement spacing is required when A_sv > 0.
Design moment and shear must be non-negative factored actions.
Reinforcement ratio is unusually high. Section likely over-reinforced or input area invalid.
ACI section is compression-controlled below yield strain. Beam flexural design not accepted by this simplified module.
ACI shear reinforcement contribution exceeds maximum permitted contribution. V_s is capped.
EC2 shear reinforcement resistance exceeds concrete strut limit. V_Rd is controlled by V_Rdmax.
RC beam fails selected shear or flexure capacity check.

smart_warnings.message: Utilization exceeds 0.90. Independent engineering review and FMEA required before release.
EC2 shear demand exceeds concrete shear resistance without links. Provide shear reinforcement or increase section.
ACI shear demand exceeds concrete-only shear design strength. Provide shear reinforcement or increase section.
EC2 neutral-axis ratio is high. Check ductility, redistribution limits, and over-reinforcement risk.
ACI section is not tension-controlled. Flexural phi factor is reduced.
Stirrup spacing appears large relative to effective depth. Check code maximum spacing limits.
Concrete cover is low. Check durability, fire rating, corrosion exposure class, and construction tolerance.
Deep/narrow beam geometry detected. Check lateral stability, detailing congestion, and strut-and-tie applicability.

engine_rules.error_propagation: ISO/IEC Guide 98-3 GUM Type A/B. Report u_c(UC), input uncertainty table, and sensitivity contributors for b_w, d, A_s, f_ck/f_c_prime, f_yk/f_y, M_Ed, V_Ed.
engine_rules.fmea: Required for UC > 0.90 or safety-critical RC beam. RPN = S × O × D. Minimum failure modes: flexural yielding, compression-controlled brittle failure, diagonal shear failure, concrete strut crushing, stirrup yielding, anchorage failure outside module, bar placement error, material strength mismatch.
engine_rules.audit_log: ISO 9001 §8.5.1 traceable fields: tool_id, version, timestamp, user_id, project_id, design_standard, national_annex_or_code_basis, input_hash, formula_version, unit_system, validation_result, UC_flexure, UC_shear, UC, status.

reference_code.interface: interface RCBeamShearFlexureInput { design_standard: 'ACI_318_25' | 'EN_1992_1_1'; beam_type: 'RECTANGULAR_SINGLY_REINFORCED'; b_w: number; h: number; d: number; cover?: number | null; f_ck: number; f_c_prime: number; lambda_concrete: number; f_yk: number; f_y: number; E_s: number; A_s: number; A_sv?: number; s_v?: number | null; stirrup_angle_deg: number; cot_theta: number; N_Ed?: number; M_Ed: number; V_Ed: number; gamma_c: number; gamma_s: number; alpha_cc: number; phi_v: number; rho_min_override?: number | null; } interface RCBeamShearFlexureOutput { rho_l: number; M_design: number; V_design: number; UC_flexure: number; UC_shear: number; UC: number; u_c_UC: number; status: 'PASS' | 'FAIL'; governing_mode: 'FLEXURE' | 'SHEAR'; standard_branch: 'ACI_318_25' | 'EN_1992_1_1'; warnings: string[]; }
reference_code.validation: Zod schema. Throw on invalid geometry, missing standard-specific parameters, negative loads, invalid reinforcement areas, invalid partial factors, over-reinforced section, and UC > 1.0.
reference_code.testing: Jest. 7 cases: EC2 nominal PASS, EC2 shear without links FAIL, EC2 strut crushing control WARN, ACI tension-controlled PASS, ACI transition phi WARN, ACI excessive Vs cap WARN, invalid geometry BLOCK.

tuv_checklist: Dimensional check completed for every formula
ACI and EC2 branch separation tested
No silent default that hides design risk
limitations: T-beam, L-beam, slab strip, doubly reinforced beam, prestressed beam, and composite section are outside scope.
Anchorage, lap splice, development length, bar cutoff, crack width, deflection, fire resistance, and seismic detailing are outside scope.
Minimum and maximum reinforcement detailing limits require project-specific code annex validation.
Strut-and-tie model required for deep beams, disturbed regions, openings, corbels, and load/support discontinuities.
